Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of the White Fox]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Path of the White Fox is a discipline followed by many in the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Path of the White Fox is the most common Path in the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — The Path of the White Fox produces madra that deceives senses, creates illusions, and twists light and sound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The Path of the White Fox involves cultivating aspects of dreams and light for the purpose of deceiving enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Path of the White Fox is disorienting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Those who follow the Path of the White Fox are stronger and better-trained than wild practitioners without large family support.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path that Sairus follows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path that can be tampered with to affect perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon made a deal with the First Elder for a copy of the White Fox Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Some in the Wei clan use goldsteel to gather light-aspect vital aura for training the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path that can be trained using the White Fox boundary formation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The First Elder of the Wei clan is rumored to know the Ruler technique of the White Fox Path.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of the White Fox is one of the Paths Lindon considers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Path of the White Fox can craft illusions using Ruler techniques that affect the mind and eyes.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path associated with certain flickers of madra.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon's illusory image was as flawless as a master of the Path of the White Fox.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Path of the White Fox has a new Jade.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path that Wei Shi Kelsa could have used to avoid capture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Path of the White Fox is an excellent method for sending messages within Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path Lindon can break down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon felt the Path of the White Fox following him.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path Seisha is studying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path associated with Remnants in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path for practitioners of illusion techniques.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon could use dream bindings from the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path members of the Twin Star Sect sought guidance on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Fox Mirror is from the Path of the White Fox.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa follows the Path of the White Fox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Path of the White Fox is a path that includes the Foxtail Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Path of the White Fox has an advantage in nighttime forest darkness.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
